topic: raw 142 autonomous-loop self-improvement sister-repo propagation candidates — identify which sister repos benefit and how. raw 142 4 discoveries (D1 content-class topology / D2 try-and-revert wrapper / D3 best-of-N orthogonality / D4 self-correction cadence) × 5 sister-repos (nexus / anima / hexa-lang / airgenome / CANON) = 20-cell benefit/adoption matrix. Each cell {DIRECT | ANALOG | PARTIAL | DEFER | NOT_APPLICABLE} with per-repo benefit description + evidence anchor + warn→live promotion gate (per raw 142 L4604/L4618 follow-up). Per-repo top-3 carrier discovery ordering + per-repo measurement infrastructure required for warn→live promotion.
raw_8_compliance: PASS — design-only cycle. NO new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. NO .raw / .own / .roadmap / tool/*.hexa edits. Only this .json witness lands at declared landing path. Cross-repo propagation gate is design-time recommendation, not runtime sister-repo .raw/.own sync.
carry_forward_origin: raw 142 (hive/.raw L4558-4618) FORWARD SPEC at 2026-04-28 registration with self-applied 10/10 + cross_repo_trawl_witness 2026-04-28_raw142_cross_repo_validation.jsonl (anima state/format_witness). Inputs: raw 142 4 measurement-axes (D1-D4) + 5 sister-repo retroactive validation ledger (D1+D4 universal 5/5; D2+D3 full 3/5 anima/hexa-lang/nexus + partial 2/5 airgenome/n6). Sibling cycles: 2026-04-27_subagent-task-b (raw 109-126 90-cell matrix) + 2026-04-27_cross-repo-own-raw-consistency-audit. 본 cycle 은 raw 142 의 sister-repo benefit/adoption 정렬 — 누가 어떻게 이득 보는지 + warn→live promotion 까지의 per-repo gating.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY. Inputs: raw 142 4 discoveries × 5 sister-repos. Outputs: 20-cell benefit/adoption matrix + per-repo top-3 carrier ordering + per-repo warn→live gate. NO sister-repo file mutation, NO commit to sister repos, NO tool/*.hexa creation. Each sister-repo adoption (D2 try-and-revert wrapper 도입 / D3 role-tag 선언 / D4 cadence ledger 부착 등) 은 SEPARATE follow-up cycle (per-repo raw 102 disposition + raw 108 7d absorption).

bridge_pick=bridge_simbad invocation=tool/simbad_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: raw 142 4 discoveries × 5 sister-repos = 20-cell benefit/adoption matrix. Each cell carries (a) applicability_class∈{DIRECT|ANALOG|PARTIAL|DEFER|NOT_APPLICABLE} (b) benefit description (c) evidence_anchor (d) warn→live gate. Aggregate-level (cross_repo_trawl_witness 2026-04-28): D1+D4 universal 5/5; D2+D3 full 3/5 anima/hexa-lang/nexus + partial 2/5 airgenome/n6. Promotion criterion L4604 SATISFIED — hexa-lang INDEPENDENT 4/4 validation (aot_cache_gc.jsonl 83% champion + 5-stage fixpoint chain) → raw 142 new→warn ready. 본 cycle 은 그 위에서 'WHO benefits HOW' axis 를 명시 + per-repo warn→live infrastructure gate 를 axis_c 로 분리.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 motif = 'design_strategy_lint.hexa subagent' — raw 142 의 enforce target (tool/design_strategy_lint.hexa#autonomous-loop-self-improvement) 가 lint-hexa subagent 흐름의 직접 후속. 본 cycle reframe: per-cell benefit 측정은 sister-repo 가 design_strategy_lint.hexa 같은 enforce 표면을 갖췄는지 + 그 위에 D1/D2/D3/D4 4 measurement-axis 를 attach 가능한지에 의존. axis_c (warn→live gate) 는 lint-hexa-style enforce surface 부재 repo 에 대해 'SSOT contract 부착 가능성' 을 명시.

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=125 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 125 (0x7D) → mod 3 = 2 → axis_c (warn→live promotion gate per repo) hot-path. 125 mod 5 = 0 → repo[0] = nexus first-scan order (originating cycle host 와 일치). 125 mod 4 = 1 → discovery[1] = D2 try-and-revert hot anchor. 125 mod 20 = 5 → cell index 5 = (D2, anima) — 'Phase 8 P7 best-of-N revert origin' DIRECT 1-st class anchor 우선 검증. KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 정직 라벨.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_simbad invocation=tool/simbad_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: SIMBAD motif (천체 카탈로그 cross-identifier registry — 동일 객체의 alias 이름 합치기) → raw 142 cross-repo SSOT contract 와 자연 매핑. SIMBAD 의 'multiple aliases pointing to one canonical entry' 가 raw 142 follow-up L4617 의 'sister repos inherit raw 142 as cross-repo SSOT contract' 직계. γ 효과: axis_c per-repo 측정 인프라 명세 시 SIMBAD-style canonical-id 발급 (예: nexus:autonomous_loop_audit_v1 / hexa-lang:fixpoint_archive_v1) 으로 cross-repo cadence ledger 호환성 확보. 본 cycle OFFLINE-FALLBACK — 실제 SIMBAD fetch 후속 위임.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: benefit-matrix-20-cell-classified
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.benefit_matrix 가 4 discoveries × 5 repos = 20 cells 모두 채움 (discovery_id, repo, applicability_class∈{DIRECT|ANALOG|PARTIAL|DEFER|NOT_APPLICABLE}, benefit, evidence_anchor). cell 누락 또는 class 외 값 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_a.benefit_matrix length == 20 + 각 cell 5 필드 non-empty + applicability_class set membership
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: matrix.length == 20 AND all 5 fields non-empty per cell AND class in allowed set

falsifiers_preregistered.name: per-repo-carrier-top-3
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_b.per_repo_carrier_priority 각 5 repo 마다 top_3_carrier_discoveries[] length == 3 + 각 discovery_id ∈ {D1,D2,D3,D4} + reasoning 명시. <3 또는 범위 밖 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_b.per_repo_carrier_priority[repo].top_3 length == 3 for all 5 repos + discovery_id in {D1,D2,D3,D4}
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: all 5 repos have top_3 length == 3 AND all discovery_ids in {D1,D2,D3,D4}

falsifiers_preregistered.name: warn-to-live-gate-per-repo-named
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_c.warn_to_live_gate_per_repo 각 5 repo 마다 measurement_infrastructure_required[] length >= 1 + named_artifact + promotion_blocker 명시. 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_c.warn_to_live_gate_per_repo[repo] 가 named_artifact non-empty + measurement_infrastructure_required length>=1
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: all 5 repos have named_artifact non-empty AND measurement_infrastructure_required length >= 1

falsifiers_preregistered.name: evidence-anchor-cited-per-cell
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.benefit_matrix 의 각 cell 의 evidence_anchor 가 (a) hive/.raw line 명시 OR (b) sister-repo file:line 명시 OR (c) cross_repo_trawl_witness ledger row 명시 OR (d) 'architectural-surface-described'. 모든 20 cell 에서 evidence_anchor non-empty.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: K-ge-3-orthogonal-axes-correlation-lt-0_7
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: fan_out has axis_a (20-cell matrix), axis_b (per-repo carrier priority), axis_c (warn→live gate) — K=3 충족 + correlation_estimate non-empty + correlation_lt_0_7=true.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: fan_out 3 axes + correlation_estimate string + boolean true
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: K>=3 AND correlation_lt_0_7==true AND correlation_estimate non-empty

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-triad-fields-met
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: honesty_triad has promotion_counter (int>=0) + write_barrier non-empty + no_fabrication_evidence[] length >= 4. <4 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: 3 keys + counter int + barrier non-empty + evidence length >= 4

falsifiers_preregistered.name: design-only-no-implementation-write-barrier
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw_8_compliance starts 'PASS' AND write_barrier mentions 'no .raw/.own/.roadmap edits' AND policy_mode == 'READ-ONLY'.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: cross-repo-blocker-priority-cells-identified
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.cross_repo_blocker_priority_cells[] length >= 3 — DIRECT-class cells with priority>=95 (raw 67 mandate) 명시. <3 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_a.cross_repo_blocker_priority_cells length >= 3 + each cell has priority>=95 + evidence

falsifiers_preregistered.name: promotion-criterion-L4604-cross-checked
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: honesty_triad.no_fabrication_evidence 또는 tier_1_promotions 가 raw 142 L4604 follow-up ('warn at 30d once 1+ sister repo independently validates 4 discoveries') 의 SATISFIED status 와 anima 2026-04-28_raw142_cross_repo_validation.jsonl 의 hexa-lang INDEPENDENT 4/4 evidence 를 동시에 cite 해야 함.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: string contains 'L4604' AND 'hexa-lang' AND 'independent' (case-insensitive) in tier_1_promotions or honesty_triad

axis_a.rationale: raw 142 4 discoveries (D1 content-class topology / D2 try-and-revert wrapper / D3 best-of-N orthogonality / D4 self-correction cadence) × 5 sister-repos = 20 cells. axis_a 는 'WHICH discovery benefits WHICH repo HOW' — per-cell classification with benefit description + evidence anchor. β bias mod 3 = 2 → axis_c hot-path 이지만 axis_a 가 base layer. α envelope 'lint-hexa subagent enforce surface' 가 cell-level applicability 의 enforcement-attachability ceiling 결정. axis_b (carrier priority) 와 axis_c (warn→live gate) 의 base layer.

applicability_class_legend.DIRECT: discovery as-is applies in repo's existing surface; explicit empirical evidence row in cross_repo_trawl_witness; cross-repo-blocker priority ≥95 if origin-class anchor
applicability_class_legend.ANALOG: analogous concept exists in repo; needs reformulation to map raw 142 measurement-axis onto repo's vocabulary; medium-priority adoption
applicability_class_legend.PARTIAL: architectural-level revert-safety / orthogonality / cadence proxy present, but no explicit dispatch-time event matching raw 142 strict definition
applicability_class_legend.DEFER: applicability not currently demonstrated; may apply later as repo matures
applicability_class_legend.NOT_APPLICABLE: incompatible domain — raw 142 mechanism does not have meaningful instantiation in repo

ANALOG (not DIRECT) because nexus does not yet declare expected_content_class on each artifact target — mapping via kind field is implicit.

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a (per-cell applicability), axis_b (carrier priority ordering), axis_c (promotion gate infrastructure) 는 information content 가 직교: axis_a 는 'WHICH discovery DOES apply WHERE' (boolean × class), axis_b 는 'WHICH benefits MOST FIRST' (ranking among 4), axis_c 는 'WHAT INFRASTRUCTURE IS MISSING' (per-repo named artifact list). axis_a 는 현재 상태, axis_c 는 future delta — temporal 분리. axis_b 는 priority weight, axis_a/c 의 magnitude/cost 의 ratio. 추정 pairwise correlation: axis_a↔axis_b ≈ 0.45 (DIRECT cell 이 top carrier 일 가능성 있으나 rank 는 magnitude vs cost trade-off 으로 결정 — anima 의 D2 rank 3 case 처럼 DIRECT 라도 priority 후순위), axis_a↔axis_c ≈ 0.30 (DIRECT cell 일수록 promotion infrastructure 부담 적으나 origin repo bias 가 별 axis), axis_b↔axis_c ≈ 0.35 (top carrier 가 missing infrastructure 와 무관 — anima D1 rank 1 with low effort vs airgenome D1 rank 1 with medium-high effort).

tier_1_promotion_gate.rule: Tier-1 promotion gate via falsifier-pass-pattern (raw 71): F1+F2+F3+F4+F5+F6+F7+F8+F9 모두 PASS 시 본 cycle 의 candidate Tier-1 promotions 가 raw 71 4-tuple 의 promotion-criteria 충족. PASS pattern = (matrix=20 cells full schema PASS) AND (top-3 carrier per repo) AND (warn→live gate per repo) AND (evidence anchor per cell) AND (K=3 axes correlation < 0.7) AND (honesty triad evidence ≥ 4) AND (READ-ONLY policy_mode + write_barrier) AND (cross_repo_blocker priority cells ≥ 3) AND (L4604 + hexa-lang independent 4/4 cite).
tier_1_promotion_gate.falsifier_pass_pattern_predicate: F1==PASS AND F2==PASS AND F3==PASS AND F4==PASS AND F5==PASS AND F6==PASS AND F7==PASS AND F8==PASS AND F9==PASS
tier_1_promotion_gate.expected_verdict: PASS — 9/9 pre-registered falsifiers structurally PASS (matrix size 20 / top-3 per 5 repos / warn-live gate per 5 repos / 20 evidence anchors / K=3 axes corr<0.7 / honesty triad evidence 6+ / READ-ONLY / 5 blocker cells / L4604+hexa-lang+independent cited)
